hooks.command: if [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ]; then terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code" -message "I have finished the current task"; else notify-send "Claude Code" "I have finished the current task"; fi
if [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ]; then terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code" -message "Permission request"; else notify-send "Claude Code" "Permission request"; fi
